summary: Phase C Admin Commission System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Both Admin and Provider dashboards display commission data correctly. Admin dashboard shows 'Commissions' tab with 8€ total commission, 8 items, 6 orders, provider breakdown (Moreati). Provider dashboard 'Finances' shows 4 cards including orange 'Commission plateforme' card (8€) with '1€ / produit vendu' model text, and by-organizer breakdown with commission columns.

issues: XD Connects images from xdconnects.com CDN may appear broken due to cross-origin restrictions - this is external CDN behavior, not a code bug. URL encoding with %20 is implemented correctly.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/commissions returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/commissions returns 403 for non-admin (provider role)
Backend: GET /api/admin/commissions returns correct structure (total_admin_commission, total_provider_items_sold, by_provider, recent_orders)
Backend: GET /api/admin/commissions by_provider breakdown has correct structure (provider_id, name, items_sold, commission, orders_count)
Backend: GET /api/admin/commissions recent_orders has correct structure (order_id, admin_commission, total)
Backend: GET /api/provider/stats returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/provider/stats includes total_admin_commission and net_revenue fields
Backend: GET /api/provider/stats net_revenue formula verified (total_sales - org_commission - admin_commission)
Backend: GET /api/provider/financial-breakdown returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/provider/financial-breakdown includes total_admin_commission and by_organizer with admin_commission
Backend: POST /api/shop/order creates order with admin_commission_total field (1€ per provider product)
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with 'Commissions' tab (data-testid='tab-commissions')
Frontend: Admin dashboard Commissions tab displays total_admin_commission card (8.00€)
Frontend: Admin dashboard Commissions tab displays total_provider_items card (8)
Frontend: Admin dashboard Commissions tab displays total_orders_with_provider card (6)
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'COMMISSIONS PAR PRESTATAIRE' section with Moreati breakdown
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'DERNIÈRES COMMANDES AVEC COMMISSION' table
Frontend: Provider dashboard loads with 'Finances' tab (data-testid='provider-tab-finances')
Frontend: Provider dashboard Finances section displays 4 summary cards
Frontend: Provider dashboard shows orange 'Commission plateforme' card (8€) with '1€ / produit vendu' text
Frontend: Provider dashboard shows 'COMMISSIONS PAR ORGANISATEUR' breakdown
Frontend: Provider dashboard by-organizer breakdown shows commission_organisateur, commission_plateforme, revenu_net columns
Backend: Image URL sanitization with %20 encoding implemented in xdconnects_import.py line 125
Frontend: getProductImages function encodes spaces as %20 in ProviderDashboard.js lines 291-296
seed_data_creation: Test order created during backend tests to verify admin_commission_total field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Admin Commission System fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/commissions (lines 90-155 in admin.py), GET /api/provider/stats (lines 87-112 in provider.py), GET /api/provider/financial-breakdown (lines 115-158 in provider.py), POST /api/shop/order (lines 84-120 in shop.py calculates admin_commission_total). Migration for existing orders at server.py lines 271-293. Frontend: AdminDashboard.js Commissions tab (lines 619-713), ProviderDashboard.js Finances section (lines 794-869). Admin commission model: 1€ per provider product sold. Current totals: 8€ commission from 8 items in 6 orders. XD Connects image URLs are correctly encoded but may appear broken due to CDN cross-origin restrictions.

order_admin_commission_calculation.behavior: Calculates admin_commission_total field (1€ per provider product sold)

xd_connects_image_url_fix.note: Some XD Connects images may appear broken due to CDN cross-origin restrictions, not URL encoding issues
